_comment: NPC: Demon Priest Mo (魔祭司莫). INFERRED: Ancient Demon City. Derivation: I = INFERRED.
name: Demon Priest Mo
personality: fanatical, believes dark cultivation is misunderstood

perception_tiers.mortal: A cultivator of Ancient Demon City
perception_tiers.qi_condensation: Demon Priest Mo, Ancient Demon cultivator

note: INFERRED: Ancient Demon City cultivator. fanatical, believes dark cultivation is misunderstood.
initiation_lines: The temple of the Ancient Demon is older than Zhao Country itself. Before the governor, before the sects  -  this temple stood. It remembers what others have forgotten.
Other cities worship ancestors or stars. We worship power. Not evil  -  power. There is a difference the Heng Yue Sect refuses to understand.
I need bones for the temple furnaces and ink for the ritual scrolls. Bring me supplies and I will share knowledge they forbid in other sects.
Taga dwells in the governor's mansion. He is the strongest cultivator in the city. Even he comes to the temple on dark moons.

sect_tasks.description: Mo: 'The temple furnaces burn bone and coal. Bring me materials and I will teach you a technique the orthodox sects suppress.'
Mo: 'I record forbidden techniques. Paper and ink  -  bring them and I will share what I know about the Ancient Demon's original cultivation path.'
